title: Replication Package for A Systematic Literature Review of Model-driven Security Engineering for Cyber-physical Systems
author: Johannes Geismann
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This package contains supplemental material for the paper "A Systematic Literature Review of Model-driven Security Engineering for Cyber-physical Systems". 

 In particular, we provide: 

 
	 The survey protocol 
	 The used search strings 
	 The search results for each library 
	 The data extraction template 
	 The data extraction sheet for each selected approach 
	 The list of all publications and their exclusion stage
